description: Equality on unique clustered B+ key -> A2: h+1=4, 1 row
query: SELECT Student.indeks FROM Student WHERE Student.indeks = S123

description: Range on non-clustered attr -> full scan cheaper than A6
query: SELECT Student.prosek FROM Student WHERE Student.prosek > 8.5

description: No WHERE -> full scan of table
Two table join -> plan root is Projection wrapping a Join
query: SELECT Student.indeks, Ispit.ocena FROM Student, Ispit WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks

description: Join with selection pushed down to Student
query: SELECT Student.indeks, Ispit.ocena FROM Student, Ispit WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks AND Student.prosek > 8.5

description: ORDER BY -> root must be SortNode
query: SELECT Student.indeks FROM Student, Ispit WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks ORDER BY Student.indeks

description: Three table join -> two JoinNodes in tree
query: SELECT Student.indeks, Predmet.naziv FROM Student, Ispit, Predmet WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks AND Ispit.predmetId = Predmet.predmetId

description: SELECT * expands to all attributes of the queried table
Equality on hash-indexed attr -> hash index used (cost=2)
query: SELECT Student.ime FROM Student WHERE Student.ime = Ana

description: Two tables with no join condition -> Cartesian product
query: SELECT Student.indeks, Predmet.naziv FROM Student, Predmet

SELECT Student.ime, Predmet.naziv, Ispit.ocena, Stipendija.iznos FROM Student, Ispit, Predmet, Stipendija WHERE Student.indeks = Ispit.studentIndeks AND Ispit.predmetId = Predmet.predmetId AND Student.indeks = Stipendija.studentIndeks

description: Conjunction of two selections on one table -> combined selectivity
query: SELECT Student.indeks FROM Student WHERE Student.smer = IN AND Student.godinaUpisa = 2020

description: 5 = 5 is literal-literal -> skipped, table gets full scan
A.x = A.y (both attrs, same table) -> selection, not join
query: SELECT Student.indeks FROM Student WHERE Student.prosek = Student.godinaUpisa

description: Literal on the left of a selection -> left side not attribute branch
query: SELECT Student.prosek FROM Student WHERE 8.5 < Student.prosek

description: Range on hash-indexed attr -> hash skipped, full scan
query: SELECT Student.ime FROM Student WHERE Student.ime > M

description: Range on clustered B+ key -> A5: h + out_blocks
query: SELECT Student.indeks FROM Student WHERE Student.indeks > S500

description: Range on secondary B+ -> A6 computed but full scan cheaper
query: SELECT Ispit.studentIndeks FROM Ispit WHERE Ispit.studentIndeks > S500

description: Join attribute with no index on one side -> index NL not viable there
query: SELECT Student.indeks, Ispit.ocena FROM Student, Ispit WHERE Student.smer = Ispit.ocena
